title: Real-Time Data with Tavily
tagline: Ground your agent in this week's news with Tavily and per-step model routing for 10× cost savings.

story.problem: Cookbooks #1 and #2 give you an agent that can answer and retrieve, but it's still frozen at its training cutoff and costs the same as OpenAI when run on a 70B model.
story.solution: A three-step agent — plan (cheap small model) → search Tavily for fresh facts → write (mid-tier model with citations). Per-step model routing on Nebius cuts cost 10× without dropping the punchline.
story.outcome: An agent that briefs you on this week's news with inline citations, streams progress as it goes, and shows the cost in the response.

quickstart.configure: cp .env.example .env  # then fill NEBIUS_API_KEY and TAVILY_API_KEY

endpoints.description: Stream the three-step agent: planning, searching, writing, citations, cost.
